name: Trigger: Weekly productivity report
description: Created from trigger: @Remi every Friday at 9am, generate productivity report
originalText: @Remi every Friday at 9am, generate productivity report

name: Trigger: Daily system check
command: wzrd "check system health and disk space"
description: Created from trigger: daily at 8am, check system health

name: Trigger: check disk space daily at 9am
command: echo "Executing: check disk space daily at 9am" && wzrd "check disk space daily at 9am"
description: Created from trigger: @Remi check disk space daily at 9am

name: Trigger: restart server
description: Created from trigger: if src/index.js changes, restart server

name: Trigger: send weekly report
command: echo "Executing: send weekly report" && wzrd "send weekly report"
description: Created from trigger: every Friday at 5pm, send weekly report
originalText: every Friday at 5pm, send weekly report
